task:
Survey the agent harness codebase focusing specifically on: 1) harness/tools/ directory - list all files and read each one, summarizing what tools are exposed and how the tool execution pipeline works. 2) harness/eval/ directory - list all files and read them to understand the evaluation framework. 3) harness/trace_bridge_parts/ - list and read all files. 4) harness/sinks/ - list and read all files. 5) harness/analytics.py - read and summarize. 6) harness/prompt_templates/ - list and read all files. 7) harness/modes/ - list and read all files. 8) harness/report.py - read and summarize. 9) harness/usage.py - skim briefly. 10) harness/cmd_recall_eval.py and harness/cmd_eval.py - read both. Return a thorough analysis of: what tools are exposed (grouped), how tool routing/dispatch works, how safety guards integrate, what the eval framework actually tests, what the trace bridge emits, and any notable gaps or concerns.", "allowed_tools": ["read_file", "list_files", "glob_files", "grep_workspace", "path_stat"], "max_turns": 40, "role": "research"}
</invoke>
